mapper.select: SELECT mr.id, mr.record_no, mr.clinic_id, c.clinic_name, mr.appointment_id, a.appointment_no, mr.doctor_id, d.staff_name AS doctor_name, mr.visit_type, mr.visit_date, mr.record_status, mr.signed_flag, mr.chief_complaint, mr.preliminary_diagnosis, mr.remark FROM medical_record mr LEFT JOIN clinic c ON c.id = mr.clinic_id LEFT JOIN appointment a ON a.id = mr.appointment_id LEFT JOIN staff d ON d.id = mr.doctor_id WHERE mr.patient_id = #{patientId} AND mr.org_id = #{orgId} AND mr.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY mr.visit_date DESC, mr.id DESC
